name: minilib
context: You are building a small CommonJS utility module lib.js (use module.exports = { ... }). Each step adds ONE pure function and must keep the previously added functions working. Read lib.js first, then add only the requested function.

rungs.title: add
rungs.prompt: Add and export a function add(a, b) that returns a + b.

rungs.title: isEven
rungs.prompt: Add and export isEven(n) returning true if n is even, false otherwise.

rungs.title: reverse
rungs.prompt: Add and export reverse(str) returning the input string reversed.

rungs.title: clamp
rungs.prompt: Add and export clamp(x, lo, hi) returning x constrained to the range [lo, hi].

rungs.title: fib
rungs.prompt: Add and export fib(n) returning the nth Fibonacci number, with fib(0)=0 and fib(1)=1 (so fib(10)=55).

rungs.title: fizzbuzz
rungs.prompt: Add and export fizzbuzz(n) returning an array for 1..n where multiples of 3 are 'Fizz', of 5 are 'Buzz', of both are 'FizzBuzz', else the number. fizzbuzz(5) === [1,2,'Fizz',4,'Buzz'].

rungs.title: unique
rungs.prompt: Add and export unique(arr) returning the array without duplicates, preserving first-seen order.
